repo.name: Nova AI
repo.description: Nova AI - Privacy-focused AI chat client with tool calling, vision, and web search.

apps.description:
Nova AI is a privacy-focused Android AI chat client supporting multiple
LLM models via the W&B Inference API.

Features:
* Multi-model: GLM-5.2, MiniMax M3, Kimi K2.7 Code
* Streaming with reasoning/thinking display
* Tool calling: calculator, time, web search (SearXNG)
* Image vision (Kimi K2.7 Code, MiniMax M3)
* Markdown with tables, code blocks, lists
* No tracking, no ads, no proprietary SDKs
apps.name: Nova AI
apps.summary: Privacy-focused AI chat with tool calling and web search
